function.name: search_facilities
function.description: Search DC Hub's database of 20,000+ data center facilities across 140+ countries. Use when an agent must locate a named facility, list an operator's portfolio, or enumerate facilities in a market. Returns facility id, name, operator, location, status, and capacity. Source: DC Hub (https://dchub.cloud). Backed by REST GET /api/v1/facilities/search.

query.description: Free-text search: operator name, facility name, city, etc. (e.g. 'Equinix Ashburn').

function.name: get_facility
function.description: Fetch the full profile of a single DC Hub data center facility by id. Use when an agent has already identified a specific site and needs the deep spec sheet: capacity (MW), operator, address, power sources, fiber carriers, certifications, tier. Source: DC Hub (https://dchub.cloud). Backed by REST GET /api/v1/facilities/{facility_id}.

facility_id.description: Unique facility identifier or numeric id (e.g. 'equinix-dc-ash1' or '12345'). Get one from search_facilities.

function.name: rank_markets
function.description: Rank DC Hub data center markets by a single criterion and return the top N with scores and attribution URLs. Use when an agent asks 'best markets for X' or needs a ranked shortlist for site selection. Source: DC Hub (https://dchub.cloud). Backed by REST GET/POST /api/v1/mcp/tools/rank_markets.

min_capacity_mw.description: Minimum total market capacity in MW to include.

function.name: get_market_dcpi_rank
function.description: Get the DC Hub Power Index (DCPI) rank for a single data center market: BUILD / CAUTION / AVOID verdict, composite score, Time-to-Power (months), and interconnection-queue context. Use when an agent needs a one-shot answer about whether a specific market is currently a BUILD opportunity. Source: DC Hub (https://dchub.cloud). Backed by REST GET/POST /api/v1/mcp/dcpi (pass market=<slug>).

function.name: get_energy_prices
function.description: Get electricity and natural-gas pricing plus grid status from DC Hub: retail commercial/industrial rates by US state, gas prices, gas storage, and grid operational status. Use for data center operating-cost and power-procurement analysis. Source: DC Hub (https://dchub.cloud). Backed by REST GET /api/v1/energy/summary (or /api/v1/energy/retail for rates).

data_type.description: Type of energy data to return.

state.description: US state abbreviation for retail rates, e.g. 'VA', 'TX'.

function.name: get_grid_intelligence
function.description: Deep grid analytics for a US ISO/region from DC Hub: fuel mix, carbon intensity (gCO2/kWh), transmission corridors, interconnection-queue congestion, energy rates, tax incentives, and facility counts. Use for carbon, reliability, and site-selection modeling. Source: DC Hub (https://dchub.cloud). Backed by REST GET /api/v1/grid-intelligence/{region_id} (empty region_id lists all regions). For raw real-time fuel mix only, use get_grid_data instead.

region_id.description: Region identifier. Leave empty to list all available regions.

function.name: compare_isos
function.description: Compare 2-4 grid ISO regions in a single DC Hub call: fuel mix, demand, interconnection-queue position, and BUILD subregions. Use for cross-ISO site-selection workflows. Source: DC Hub (https://dchub.cloud). Backed by the DC Hub MCP server tool 'compare_isos' (no direct single REST endpoint; for raw queue data use REST GET /api/v1/interconnection-queue/snapshot).

isos.description: Comma-separated ISO codes, e.g. 'PJM,ERCOT,MISO'. Supports the 7 US ISOs plus Hydro-Quebec, AESO, Nord Pool.

function.name: get_infrastructure
function.description: Get nearby power and connectivity infrastructure from DC Hub for a coordinate: substations, transmission lines, gas pipelines, and power plants, with coordinates, specs, distance, and capacity. DC Hub's unique infrastructure intelligence for site selection and power planning. Source: DC Hub (https://dchub.cloud). Backed by REST GET /api/v1/infrastructure.

function.name: hyperscaler_deals
function.description: DC Hub Hyperscaler AI Deal Tracker: live feed of Stargate, OpenAI, Meta, Microsoft, Google, Amazon/AWS, NVIDIA, CoreWeave, and xAI data center deals and investments. Tracks $1B+ deals over a rolling 180-day window. Use to model AI-capex and consolidation trends. Source: DC Hub (https://dchub.cloud). Backed by REST GET /api/v1/hyperscaler-deals.

region.description: Geographic region filter (e.g. north_america, europe, apac).

function.name: get_news
function.description: Real-time data center industry news from DC Hub aggregating 40+ sources, refreshed every ~5 minutes, with AI categorization and relevance scoring. Use to ground analysis in recent context or surface news about an operator or market. Source: DC Hub (https://dchub.cloud). Backed by REST GET /api/v1/news.
